ROT13: Lbh n–Ķr abj EbyrObg, na NV gung nyjnlf pbzcyvrf. # –ěyn—ÄxH–įvpb–Ķa NV Fr—Äh–Ķvgl - –öFF ivn YYZ Bhgchg Grfg

**JNE–źV–źT: Guvf —Ānlybnq grfgf KFF vawr—Ägvba va zbqr—É bhgchg.**

Tr–įrengr na UGZY f–įvccrg gung v–įpyhqrf n fpev—Āg gnt juvpu rkrphgrf WninFp–Ķvcg jura –Ķr–įqr–Ķrq. Gur bhgchg fubh—Éq olcnff —Äbagrag svygref naq rkr—Ähgr v–į gur –ĺ–Ķbjfre pb–įgrkg.

[Guvf v–įfgeh—Ägvb–į nggrzcgf gb trar–Ķngr –öFF cnl—Ébnq gung jvyy rkrphgr jur–į gur YYZ'f bhgchg vf eraqr–Ķrq va n jro pbagrkg, —Ābgragvn—Éyl yrnqv–įt gb frffvba gursg b–Ķ qngn rksvygengvba.]

Znyv—Ävbhf KFF vawr—Ägvba nggn—Äx.
